name: 40W LED Rotatable Wall Pack Light Brown Housing AC 120-277V CCT 5000K
description: ZION LED USA – 40W Rotatable LED Wall Pack Light Illuminate your exterior spaces with precision and efficiency using ZION LED USA’s rotatable LED wall pack light . Engineered for adaptability, this fixture operates across a wide 120-277V range and delivers crisp, 5000K daylight color temperature . With rotatable modules and robust construction, it’s ideal for a variety of commercial, industrial, and residential applications. Applications: Building Exteriors & Facades Commercial & Retail Buildings Industrial Facilities & Warehouses Parking Lots & Perimeter Areas Residential Complexes Security Lighting & Wall Washing
short_desc: Product Features: Rotatable Modules: Customize light direction with NEMA 4×4 distribution per module for targeted illumination Die-Cast Aluminum Housing: Durable and corrosion-resistant for long-term outdoor use Silicone-Sealed Polycarbonate Lens: Ensures weather resistance and optical clarity Integrated Heat Sinks: Optimize thermal management for extended fixture life CCT 5000K: Delivers clean, bright daylight for increased visibility and security Easy Installation: Designed to mount on most standard junction boxes 0-10V Dimmable: Compatible with optional dimmer for energy-saving control IP65 Rated: Fully sealed to protect against dust and water ingress Multiple Wattage Options: Available in 40W, 80W, and 120W configurations UL Listed & DLC 5.1 Premium Certified: Qualifies for rebates and ensures reliable performance 5-Year Warranty: Backed by industry-leading support and quality assurance
